label: Visitor Management

links.description: Pre-register candidates, customers and VIPs with a token-based invitation link.
links.label: Visitor Invitation

links.description: Primary visitor record — walk-in or portal; drives approval, badge, QR, gate flow.
links.label: Visitor Pass

links.description: Gate events — check-in/out, gate transfer, alerts, identity & item verification.
links.label: Security Log

links.description: Tracks areas each visitor moves through for health/safety contact tracing.
links.label: Contact Trace Record

links.description: Immutable audit trail of every lifecycle event for a visitor pass.
links.label: Visitor Event Log

links.description: Meals, cab, hotel, factory tour, buggy, greeting — auto-synced from the pass.
links.label: Hospitality Request

links.description: Book meeting rooms for external / hybrid visits with overlap and capacity checks.
links.label: Conference Room Booking

links.description: Master list of rooms — capacity, amenities, min/max booking window.
links.label: Conference Room

links.description: Areas available for factory tours — route planning & safety briefings.
links.label: Factory Tour Area

links.description: Post-visit compliance scorecard — ID, photo, items, health, no-show.
links.label: Compliance Check

links.description: Declare an emergency — triggers muster roll-call for all on-premise visitors.
links.label: Emergency Event

links.description: Evacuation muster roll — tracks Pending / Accounted / Missing / Excused per visitor.
links.label: Evacuation Muster

links.description: Blocked visitor list — checked on pass submission and again at gate check-in.
links.label: Visitor Blacklist

links.description: System-wide VMS policy — gates, badge rules, max visit hours, blacklist behaviour.
links.label: VMS Settings

name: Visitor Management
title: Visitor Management
